title: Space/queryChanges enumerates entire collection every call
description: space_query_changes and message_query_changes enumerate all items to reconstruct the 'added' list on every call when state has changed. There is no delta tracking. For a relay with many spaces or message history, this is O(n) per poll, and clients that poll frequently will generate repeated full scans. canCalculateChanges: false is correct and honest, but the handler still builds the full added array each time. This is acceptable for Phase 4 scale but will not survive a multi-tenant deployment. Track new IDs incrementally in the store instead of reconstructing.
